task_completion.description: Open the NREL 5MW Reference project file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QBlade application is open with 'NREL_5MW_Reference' visible in the project tree or application title bar.

task_completion.description: Configure the HAWT BEM Range Simulation with specified parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation setup or definition window in QBlade showing a wind speed range from 5 to 25 m/s with a 1 m/s step size, fixed rotational speed set to 9 RPM, and pitch set to 0 degrees.

task_completion.description: Export the simulation results to stall_simulation_data.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager showing 'stall_simulation_data.txt' in the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory, or a text editor displaying the file with tabular simulation data (wind speed, power, etc.).

task_completion.description: Identify peak power and wind speed, and record them in stall_report.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing 'stall_report.txt' containing recorded values for both the peak power and the specific wind speed at which it occurs.

task_completion.description: Save the completed project as stall_analysis.wpa
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QBlade application title bar shows 'stall_analysis.wpa' or a file manager shows 'stall_analysis.wpa' successfully saved in the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QBlade graphical interface being actively used to set up and run the simulation, rather than just terminal commands creating text files.

integrity.description: The exported simulation data appears genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of stall_simulation_data.txt should look like standard software-generated tabular data with appropriate headers and multiple rows corresponding to the 5-25 m/s range, not manually typed dummy data.

integrity.description: The reported peak power and wind speed are derived from the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in stall_report.txt should logically match the peak values visible in the QBlade graphs/tables or the exported data file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The NREL 5MW Reference turbine has a rated power of 5 MW and rated wind speed of 11.4 m/s. The task simulates a sub-rated fixed rotational speed of 9 RPM. Due to stall effects at this lower RPM, the expected peak wind speed for maximum power is approximately 10 m/s. The VLM should verify that the reported peak wind speed in stall_report.txt is around 10 m/s, and that the exported data file contains realistic simulation columns.
